name: gbrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with Postgres + pgvector hybrid search

embedding_provider.description: Embedding provider: ollama or openai. This fork defaults to ollama unless you explicitly set openai.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model name (for example qwen3-embedding:8b or text-embedding-3-large)

embedding_base_url.description: Base URL for Ollama embeddings (defaults to http://127.0.0.1:11434, or uses GBRAIN_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL / OLLAMA_HOST if set)

openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key for the OpenAI embedding fallback (uses OPENAI_API_KEY env var if not set)
